case_title: TRELOK SURE, T&B TRAVEL VS A L L N E T CORPORATE HEADQUARTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TRELOK SURE, T&B TRAVEL AS TO DEFENDANT A L L N E T CORPORATE HEADQUARTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-1995 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
PLAINTIFF DID CERTIFIED MAIL HIMSELF, NOT THRU THIS OFFICE.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,966.59 FILED BY A L L N E T CORPORATE HEADQUARTER AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TRELOK SURE, T&B TRAVEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-1995 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRELOK SURE, T&B TRAVEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT A L L N E T CORPORATE HEADQUARTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CONT.REQ.OF DEF.RETURNED,WANTS TO FILE DEF'S CLAIM ALSO.- SENT FORM AND INFO TO THEM.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-05-1995, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-03-1995 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
TEMP.WAITING ORDER ON CONTO BY DEF.-THEN:DEF'S CLAIM TO BE FILED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF TRELOK SURE, T&B TRAVEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT A L L N E T CORPORATE HEADQUARTER RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT TRELOK SURE, T&B TRAVEL $1,066.59 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,081.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
